mapper.sql: tag_id, tag_name, tag_color, order_num, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
t.tag_id, t.tag_name, t.tag_color, t.order_num, t.status, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM plan_scheme_tag WHERE 1 = 1
AND tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY order_num ASC, tag_id ASC
SELECT FROM plan_scheme_tag t INNER JOIN plan_scheme_tag_rel r ON t.tag_id = r.tag_id WHERE r.scheme_id = #{schemeId} ORDER BY t.order_num ASC, t.tag_id ASC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM plan_scheme_tag WHERE tag_id IN
#{tagId}
